# PuSegmented

## Intent

- segmented control
- single-choice switch
- view mode switch
- compact tabs

## Prefer When

- Use for compact single-choice mode, filter, or page-view switching with keyboard behavior.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for large option sets or free-form navigation; use PuTabs, PuPicker, or application routing as appropriate.

## Import

```ts
import { PuSegmented } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```

## Props

- `modelValue`
- `semantics`
- `activation`
- `disabled`
- `orientation`
- `size`
- `density`
- `tone`
- `fullWidth`
- `equalWidth`
- `ariaLabel`
- `ariaLabelledby`

## Slots

- `default`

## Events

- `update:modelValue`
- `change`

## Composition

- PuSegmentedItem
- PuPageHeader
- PuCard

## Story Variants

Story: `src/stories/display/PuSegmented.story.vue`

- Radio Control
- Page View Tabs
- Icons And Counts
- Sizes And Density
- Manual Keyboard Activation
- Vertical Disabled Group

## Types

- `PuSegmentedActivation`
- `PuSegmentedDensity`
- `PuSegmentedOrientation`
- `PuSegmentedSemantics`
- `PuSegmentedSize`
- `PuSegmentedTone`
- `PuSegmentedValue`

## Caveats

- Use semantics="tabs" only when the items control associated tab panels.
